summary: Manage the TPU/JAX teacher-training environment, compare singing runs, export samples, evaluate checkpoints, and launch targeted reruns.

workerTools.name: inspect_status
workerTools.description: Inspect TPU training status and compare the best singing-priority baseline against the latest stream-weighted run.

workerTools.name: evaluate_best_checkpoint
workerTools.description: Run the canonical eval command against the best-known singing checkpoint.

workerTools.name: export_best_validation_samples
workerTools.description: Export canonical singing validation samples from the best-known checkpoint.

workerTools.name: start_best_known_rerun
workerTools.description: Launch the best-known singing-priority training rerun in tmux and report the receipt.

workerTools.name: propose_improvement
workerTools.description: Inspect the current bottleneck and propose a stronger objective/modeling change for singing quality.
